LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_PlayerColonist.title: Colony old man
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_PlayerColonist.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived a difficult, but interesting and happy life in colony.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_PlayerPrisoner.title: Prisoner old man
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_PlayerPrisoner.description: [PAWN_nameDef] met {PAWN_gender ? his : her} old age as a prisoner of the colony.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_PlayerSlave.title: Slave old man
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_PlayerSlave.description: [PAWN_nameDef] met {PAWN_gender ? his : her} old age as a slave of the colony.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_WiseOldMan.title: Wise old man
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_WiseOldMan.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived a difficult, but interesting and happy life in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} own way.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_ElderlyWriter.title: Elderly writer
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_ElderlyWriter.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived a long life, filling the pages of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} diaries and books. {PAWN_gender ? His : Her} work has survived many eras, but with each passing year {PAWN_gender ? his : her} words became more and more valuable to those seeking answers in a world full of change. Now, when {PAWN_gender ? his : her} strength is no longer the same, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} still writes, looking back at the past and trying to understand the new times.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_TiredPhilosopher.title: Tired philosopher
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_TiredPhilosopher.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] has gone a long way from a young dreamer to an old {PAWN_gender ? man : woman}, who still asks questions about the meaning of life, but every year the search became more and more silent. {PAWN_gender ? His : Her} texts have become rare, and views on the world have changed, but {PAWN_gender ? he : she} still believes in the importance of thinking that can change a person. Old age has not diminished {PAWN_gender ? his : her} craving for the search for truth, but took away the strength for a long debate.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_RetiredSoldier.title: Retired soldier
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_RetiredSoldier.description: [PAWN_nameDef] survived many military conflicts in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} youth, but now, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} looks back on those years with bitterness. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} saw the horrors of war, but {PAWN_gender ? he : she} also realized the importance and fragility of peace. Over the course of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} lost many comrades, but {PAWN_gender ? he : she} still wears the medals {PAWN_gender ? he : she} received for bravery with pride. In {PAWN_gender ? his : her} later years, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} strives to teach the youth to appreciate the peace.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_OldMechanic.title: Old mechanic
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_OldMechanic.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has spent {PAWN_gender ? his : her} entire life taking apart and putting together machines, from the simplest to the most complex on this planet. {PAWN_gender ? His : Her} hands now shake like the parts of a broken machine, and sometimes {PAWN_gender ? he : she} can't build something with the same precision as before. But {PAWN_gender ? his : her} mind is still full of knowledge about how machines work. {PAWN_gender ? His : Her} memory sometimes fails, but the old mechanic can still fix almost anything puts {PAWN_gender ? his : her} hands on.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_Sage.title: Sage
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_Sage.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has spent {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life as not only an elder, but also a keeper of knowledge. For many years, has passed on stories and lessons learned through experience to younger generations. Now, as {PAWN_gender ? he : she} approaches death, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} watches {PAWN_gender ? his : her} legacy fade and feels that time has passed. However, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} continues to share {PAWN_gender ? his : her} wisdom with those willing to listen, despite {PAWN_gender ? his : her} weariness and loss of strength.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_LonelyWanderer.title: Lonely wanderer
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_LonelyWanderer.description: [PAWN_nameDef] in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} youth traveled the world, but now, in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} old age, {PAWN_gender ? his : her} legs can no longer take {PAWN_gender ? him : her} that far. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} remembers the times when wandered through distant lands, and looks with sadness at {PAWN_gender ? his : her} home, which has become cramped and lifeless. In old age, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} is alone, and only memories of past travels give life some meaning.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_ElderlyScientist.title: Elderly scientist
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_ElderlyScientist.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] was always one of those who sought answers to questions that tormented humanity. Over the years, {PAWN_gender ? his : her} research became less and less visible, and {PAWN_gender ? his : her} articles lost popularity. However, despite {PAWN_gender ? his : her} old age, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} still continues to work, although {PAWN_gender ? he : she} understands that it is unlikely that {PAWN_gender ? his : her} discoveries will be able to change anything in a world that has changed too much.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_BoringProfessor.title: Boring professor
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_BoringProfessor.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been a lifelong scholar, moving into teaching students in recent years. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} is truly passionate about {PAWN_gender ? his : her} work, but sees that {PAWN_gender ? his : her} former mental strength is fading. Students often disdain the older professor, causing {PAWN_gender ? his : her} to lose their temper.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_AvidHunter.title: Avid hunter
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_AvidHunter.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has spent much time in the forests and mountains, following prey and learning to survive in the most difficult conditions. {PAWN_gender ? His : Her} strength is not what it used to be, and {PAWN_gender ? he : she} can no longer catch animals with the same agility as in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} youth. But {PAWN_gender ? his : her} memory is still clear, and {PAWN_gender ? he : she} passes on {PAWN_gender ? his : her} knowledge to others, though not without regret that the years have passed, and with them {PAWN_gender ? his : her} former skills.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_OldBlacksmith.title: Old blacksmith
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_OldBlacksmith.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has forged tons of metal, creating weapons, tools, and jewelry. {PAWN_gender ? His : Her} hammer, while not as powerful as it once was, can still move heavy machinery, but old age has slowed it down. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} often sits at {PAWN_gender ? his : her} forge, reflecting on how many times {PAWN_gender ? his : her} hands have created something that changed the course of history. Now, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} is proud that {PAWN_gender ? his : her} forge still functions, but also knows that {PAWN_gender ? his : her} time is coming to an end.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_Homeless.title: Homeless
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_Homeless.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived a long and unusual life. The cruel irony is that in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} old age {PAWN_gender ? he : she} found {PAWN_gender ? himself : herself} on the street. With no one to care for {PAWN_gender ? him : her}, all {PAWN_gender ? he : she} can do is try to survive and enjoy the little things {PAWN_gender ? he : she} has left.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_OldAlcoholic.title: Old alcoholic
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_OldAlcoholic.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has suffered a major loss that has left {PAWN_gender ? him : her} mentally devastated. Gradually, [PAWN_nameDef] has become an alcoholic, spending most of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} day in the company of a bottle of beer. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} is rarely seen sober, and {PAWN_gender ? his : her} mind has completely lost all sharpness.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_AbandonedOldMan.title: Abandoned old man
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_AbandonedOldMan.description: [PAWN_nameDef]'s life ceased to interest those close to {PAWN_gender ? him : her}. The few who remained faithful to {PAWN_gender ? him : her} are already in the grave. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} lives out {PAWN_gender ? his : her} last years alone, constantly feeling an endless longing for the past.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_QuietGardener.title: Quiet gardener
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_QuietGardener.description: [PAWN_nameDef] never thought {PAWN_gender ? he : she} would love plants so much. Watching them grow slowly brings {PAWN_gender ? him : her} peace of mind. Flowers, vegetables, trees, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} expands the garden with maniacal zeal, dissolving in it day after day.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_RetiredInvestigator.title: Retired investigator
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_RetiredInvestigator.descrip: [PAWN_nameDef] has solved hundreds of cases of varying scale. These were petty thefts, murders of high-ranking officials of the empire, sabotage of the production of nutritional paste for remote colonies. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} remembers everything, but nothing exactly. Gradually, the memory of the past days leaves {PAWN_gender ? him : her}, however, it seems {PAWN_gender ? he : she} has found peace.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_FormerLeader.title: Former leader
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_FormerLeader.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was once the leader of a large faction that controlled trade routes on a distant feral world. Now, in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} old age, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} no longer has the power {PAWN_gender ? he : she} once had, and {PAWN_gender ? his : her} mind is filled with memories of lost friends and betrayal. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} often sits alone, pondering what {PAWN_gender ? he : she} could have done differently, and hoping that {PAWN_gender ? his : her} experiences will one day prove useful to future generations.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_UnnecessaryResearcher.title: Unnecessary researcher
Unnecessary researcher
Researcher
Researcher
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_UnnecessaryResearcher.descr: [PAWN_nameDef] became fascinated with archaeology, unraveling the ancient mysteries of the fringe world. Now, in {PAWN_gender ? him : her} old age, {PAWN_gender ? him : her} knees can no longer withstand long hikes, and {PAWN_gender ? him : her} eyes no longer see the details as they once did. But the fire of curiosity still burns in {PAWN_gender ? him : her} heart, and {PAWN_gender ? he : she} often rereads old records, hoping that one day {PAWN_gender ? he : she} will find something that will change history.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_OldAlchemist.title: Old alchemist
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_OldAlchemist.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has spent years searching for the Philosopher's Stone, the secret of immortality, and other great goals. However, over the years, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} has come to realize that {PAWN_gender ? his : her} powers are no longer what they once were, and {PAWN_gender ? his : her} experiments have not yielded the results {PAWN_gender ? he : she} longed for. All {PAWN_gender ? he : she} has left are the books and notes {PAWN_gender ? he : she} used to try to explain the mysteries of the universe. But even now, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} continues {PAWN_gender ? his : her} research, despite {PAWN_gender ? his : her} restlessness and fatigue.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_ElderlyModder.title: Elderly modder
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_ElderlyModder.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent many years developing application software and modifications for {PAWN_gender ? his : her} favorite game. Unfortunately, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} never became popular in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} home world and spent {PAWN_gender ? his : her} old age in poverty.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_KindTeacher.title: Kind teacher
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_KindTeacher.description: [PAWN_nameDef] didn't think {PAWN_gender ? he : she}'d last long in the teaching profession. {PAWN_gender ? He : She}'s become an example to many young people, guiding their lives in what {PAWN_gender ? he : she} believes is a better direction. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} continues to try, even though {PAWN_gender ? he : she} feels the onset of infirmity.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_WeakSurgeon.title: Weak surgeon
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_WeakSurgeon.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has performed many complex surgeries, becoming a sought-after surgeon in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} industrial world. However, the years have taken their toll. {PAWN_gender ? His : Her} hands are increasingly shaking, which once led to a serious medical error. Since then, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} no longer performs surgeries, focusing on scientific work.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_RanchOwner.title: Ranch owner
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_RanchOwner.description: [PAWN_nameDef] settled down on a small ranch, raising alpacas and muffalo. It's not easy, but {PAWN_gender ? he : she} tries to keep the ranch in good shape.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_TiredMerchant.title: Tired merchant
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_TiredMerchant.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was long known as the most successful merchant in the region. Now, in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} old age, {PAWN_gender ? his : her} travels have become rare, and {PAWN_gender ? his : her} trading days have become increasingly a thing of the past. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} spends {PAWN_gender ? his : her} days reflecting on the deals that led to {PAWN_gender ? his : her} success, and sometimes regrets that {PAWN_gender ? he : she} was not able to retire sooner, feeling the futility of pursuing wealth.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_FormerForeman.title: Former foreman
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_FormerForeman.description: [PAWN_nameDef] was once an army commander, but as {PAWN_gender ? he : she} aged, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} lost many of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} fighting skills and abilities. Now {PAWN_gender ? he : she} spends {PAWN_gender ? his : her} time in peace, reminiscing about {PAWN_gender ? his : her} youth and telling stories to others, but {PAWN_gender ? his : her} time has passed. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} is proud of what {PAWN_gender ? he : she} has done, but also knows that the world has changed and {PAWN_gender ? he : she} is no longer needed. Sometimes, {PAWN_gender ? his : her} dead friends visit {PAWN_gender ? him : her} in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} nightmares.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_FadedMusicStar.title: Faded music star
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_FadedMusicStar.description: [PAWN_nameDef] became a local music artist, quickly gaining popularity. However, new generations of the planet's inhabitants have practically lost all interest in {PAWN_gender ? him : her}, and {PAWN_gender ? his : her} musical career has long ended. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} still cannot let go of the past.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_Handyman.title: Handyman
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_Handyman.description: [PAWN_nameDef] found himself no longer needed in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} profession in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} old age, forcing {PAWN_gender ? him : her} to become a common laborer. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} has had a hard time accepting the new reality, and {PAWN_gender ? his : her} body can barely withstand the strain.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_BakeryPastryChef.title: Bakery pastry chef
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_BakeryPastryChef.descriptio: [PAWN_nameDef] has gotten a good handle on cooking, having found a job at a bakery. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} has spent years honing {PAWN_gender ? his : her} skills, but the years have taken their toll. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} has begun to make simple mistakes, but customers still love {PAWN_gender ? him : her}.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_OldCook.title: Old cook
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_OldCook.description: [PAWN_nameDef] spent years at the stove, turning simple ingredients into dishes that brought people together. Now, when the flavors are barely noticeable, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} cooks for the memories and the silence that fills the kitchen.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_MuseumCurator.title: Museum curator
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_MuseumCurator.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has dedicated {PAWN_gender ? his : her} life to preserving the past. In {PAWN_gender ? his : her} old age, {PAWN_gender ? he : she} knows the sound of the silence of abandoned halls, and can tell the story of any object — even if no one is listening.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_ElderlyBotanist.title: Elderly botanist
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_ElderlyBotanist.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has grown more plants than has seen people, and {PAWN_gender ? he : she} remembers every one. With age, {PAWN_gender ? his : her} eyesight has become worse, but {PAWN_gender ? his : her} hands still remember how to handle life with care.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_Librarian.title: Librarian
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_Librarian.description: [PAWN_nameDef] lived among books for so long that learned to distinguish editions and authors by smell. Over the years, {PAWN_gender ? his : her} eyesight has failed, but {PAWN_gender ? his : her} memory still holds thousands of stories.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_FormerDancer.title: Former dancer
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_FormerDancer.description: [PAWN_nameDef] performed in front of crowds, but as the years passed, all that was left was old shoes and music in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} head. Sometimes {PAWN_gender ? he : she} still dances, alone, to sounds that are no longer there.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_Watchmaker.title: Watchmaker
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_Watchmaker.description: [PAWN_nameDef] collected hundreds of clocks, but even they cannot stop aging. Now {PAWN_gender ? he : she} listens to the ticking and smiles - because every second lived consciously is more valuable than eternity.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_ForgottenArtist.title: Forgotten artist
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_ForgottenArtist.description: [PAWN_nameDef] drew dreams - and turned them into reality. With age came weakness, but in the head of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} a world still blooms, inaccessible to others.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_RepentantKiller.title: Repentant killer
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_RepentantKiller.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has killed many innocent people because they stood in {PAWN_gender ? his : her} way. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} has long since acknowledged {PAWN_gender ? his : her} mistakes and will never touch a weapon again.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_EternalJoker.title: Eternal joker
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_EternalJoker.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been smiling constantly in recent years, and jokes are constantly on {PAWN_gender ? his : her} lips. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} seems like a truly happy {PAWN_gender ? old man : old woman}.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_TiredLabAssistant.title: Tired lab assistant
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_TiredLabAssistant.descripti: [PAWN_nameDef] can't remember when {PAWN_gender ? he : she} first started working at the lab. {PAWN_gender ? He : She} spent thousands of hours cleaning and preparing the lab, but never received a promotion.
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_Anchorman.title: Anchorman
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_Unknown.title: Unknown
LanguageData.UB_Elderhood_Anchorman.description: [PAWN_nameDef] has been broadcasting on one of the TV channels of {PAWN_gender ? his : her} outlying world for many years. It seems that {PAWN_gender ? his : her} face is known to every inhabitant of the planet, but {PAWN_gender ? he : she} understands that sooner or later {PAWN_gender ? he : she} will have to leave.
